ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sandra Clark appeared by telephone for Janette Yount.

Ms. Clark stated that the Trustee did not know that she had to do accountings, that the Trustee was not aware that the Trust was under continual Court jurisdiction and explained the extent of services provided to support the Trustee's fees. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
